resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def findComplement(self, num: int) -> int:
        mask = (1 << (num.bit_length())) - 1
        return num ^ mask
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Compute a bitmask with all bits set up to the most-significant bit of num, then XOR num with this mask to flip every bit.
